# Taninwat Kaewpankan

Software engineer based in Copenhagen, Denmark.
Personal site: https://taninwatkaewpankan.xyz

## About

Taninwat Kaewpankan (goes by Ice) is a software engineer with a background in
product thinking and entrepreneurship. Originally from Thailand, he moved to
Sweden at 16, studied at Uppsala University (BA Game Design & Project
Management, MSc Entrepreneurship), and now lives in Copenhagen, Denmark.

He builds with React, TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js. He is an equity partner
at Trailr AI, a pre-launch AI startup where he led the frontend architecture
and a full platform overhaul from design brief to shipped product.

## Skills

Frontend: React 19, Next.js (App Router), TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Supabase, REST APIs
Tooling: Vitest, Playwright, GitHub Actions, Figma
Approach: Product thinking, design systems, accessibility, performance

## Projects

- Bevisly (https://bevisly.com) — Skill verification platform. Full-stack:
  React, TypeScript, Supabase, PostgreSQL with row-level security.
- Satoshi Standard (https://www.satoshi-standard.xyz) — Bitcoin purchasing power
  dashboard. React, Tailwind, real-time price API, full Vitest test suite.
- Cinema Booking System (https://cinema-booking-system-project.vercel.app) —
  Full-stack booking engine with concurrent seat-locking at the data layer.
  React, Node.js, SQLite.
- Racha Beauty & Wellness (https://rachabeautywellness.com) — Commercial site
  built from scratch. 95+ Lighthouse score, measurable local SEO improvement.

## Experience

- Equity Partner & Frontend Developer, Trailr AI (Sep 2025 – Present)
- Head of Organization, Millennial Consulting (2023 – 2025)
- Business Development Intern, Spreadly (Jan 2023 – Mar 2023)

## Education

- Professional Program, Frontend Development — Jensen Yrkeshögskola (2024 – 2026)
- MSc Business & Management (Entrepreneurship) — Uppsala University (2022 – 2023)
- BA Game Design & Project Management — Uppsala University (2019 – 2022)
